title: An intense tent
lines: The week has reached its unnatural conclusion, or perhaps time has simply ceased to function in the way you once understood. Seven days ago, you sought the absolute solitude of these desolate hills, fleeing the frantic noise of a world that felt increasingly fragile and hollow.

The silence outside your meager canvas shelter is now absolute—a cold, heavy weight that presses against the fabric like a physical presence. The 'civilization' you once called home now feels like a half-remembered fever dream from a life that no longer belongs to you.
It is time to emerge and face whatever has replaced the world you knew.

options.desc: 1. Consume the last of the chocolate cake
2. Retreat into the safety of dreamless sleep
3. Dismantle your shelter and face the valley
